2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.3.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3021.issue: [S3021] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 22. Consider updating to the recommended version 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 22 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3032.issue: [W3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.3.0" was found for current release 1.3.0. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5039.issue: [W5039] "admin/words.js" found but not referenced anywhere. File seems to be outdated, please consider removing it.

5063.issue: [W5063] JSON formatting in "admin/jsonConfig.json" is hard to read (inconsistent indentation). Please use consistent indentation and proper line breaks.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_StandardTab/items/ex_charger_link" attribute "label" uses key "https://my.wallbox.com/chargers" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6013.issue: [E6013] [README.md](https://github.com/SKB-CGN/ioBroker.mywallbox/blob/master/README.md) suggests to install the adapter directly from GitHub, directly from npm or using npm commands. Installation from GitHub is discouraged. Please remove these instructions.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/SKB-CGN/ioBroker.mywallbox/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/SKB-CGN/ioBroker.mywallbox/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/SKB-CGN/ioBroker.mywallbox/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0086.issue: [W0086] "@tsconfig/node14" should match the major node.js version from [package.json](https://github.com/SKB-CGN/ioBroker.mywallbox/blob/master/package.json) engines.node (>=20).
